---
title: Branding Example
format: html
---

## Logo without tag

{{< brand logo small-no-tag >}} 

## Logo with tag

{{< brand logo small-wtih-tag >}}

# brand.yml extension

Here is some inline code: `def foo(x): return x`{.python} and `y`{.python} and `z`{.python}.

Here is [a link](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/brand.html#applying-brand) to Quarto docs for applying branding.

Here is a code block:

```{.r}
# | echo: true
fibonacci <- function(n) {
  if (n <= 0) {
    return(NULL)
  } else if (n == 1) {
    return(0)
  } else if (n == 2) {
    return(1)
  } else {
    return(fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2))
  }
}
```
